free_text: SCHEDULE A - ASSETS & "UNEARNED INCOME" — blank grid form (Blocks A-E). Name: Rohit Khanna, Page 2 of 7. The only entry in the data area is the notation "Please see the attached" in the first data row (Block A). The pre-printed grayed example rows (Mega Corp Cmn / Simon & Schuster / ABC Hedge Fund) are the standard form examples and are not real data. Actual transaction data is in the attached tables on the following pages. "Use additional sheets if more space is required."
